coursework.name: Data Science Project I & II
coursework.desc: Two-quarter capstone sequence focusing on a comprehensive data science project, from problem definition to final presentation.

coursework.name: Representation Learning
coursework.desc: Explores machine learning techniques for learning suitable representations from data, covering PCA, CNNs, RNNs, and aspects of deep learning.

coursework.name: Mathematics of Finance
coursework.desc: Examination of the mathematics of basic derivative securities in financial markets, applying linear algebra and probability to financial modeling.

coursework.name: Econometrics A/B/C
coursework.desc: Rigorous sequence in econometrics covering probability, statistics, multiple regression, and advanced methods for cross-sectional and panel data.

coursework.name: Systems for Scalable Analytics
coursework.desc: Focuses on the principles of scalable data systems, distributed computing, and the practical implementation of data-intensive analytics.

coursework.name: Probabilistic Modeling and ML
coursework.desc: An introduction to machine learning from a probabilistic perspective, covering generative models, Bayesian inference, and foundational algorithms.

coursework.name: Data Analysis and Inference
coursework.desc: Comprehensive study of statistical inference and data analysis techniques with an emphasis on mathematical foundations.

coursework.name: Recommender Sys & Web Mining
coursework.desc: Covers current methods for data mining and predictive analytics, focusing on recommender systems, text mining, and network analysis.
